title: lathyrus montanus subsp. tenuifolius
intro: Lathyrus montanus subsp. tenuifolius, also known as the slender pea or narrow-leaved pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus montanus subsp. tenuifolius include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
